searchDocs.title: Recommended usage​
searchDocs.content: local DataService = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2) local Paths = DataService.Server.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema data:Set(Paths.Currencies.Coins, 100) local coins = data:Get(Paths.Currencies.Coins) data:GetChangedSignal(Paths.Currencies.Coins):Connect(function(newValue, oldValue) print(newValue, oldValue) end)   Paths live on the service (DataService.Server.Paths), not on the data instance.

searchDocs.title: Shared modules​
searchDocs.content: In ReplicatedStorage.Shared modules:  local DataService = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2) -- Server (after Server:Init) local Paths = DataService.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema -- Client (after Client:Init) local Paths = DataService.Client.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema   On 2.2.2+, DataService.Client exists on the server as a safe facade with stub Paths. Client methods only work on the client.

searchDocs.title: Legacy format​
searchDocs.content: String arrays still work:  data:Set({ "Currencies", "Coins" }, 100)   Prefer typed paths for autocomplete and fewer typos.

searchDocs.title: Validation​
searchDocs.content: Option	Default	DescriptionStrictPaths	true	Blocks writes to invalid paths AutoCreateMissingTables	false	Does not auto-create missing nested tables  Legacy permissive mode:  DataServiceServer:Init({ Template = DataTemplate, StrictPaths = false, AutoCreateMissingTables = true, })

searchDocs.title: Private data​
searchDocs.content: Paths in Exclude are not replicated to the client:  DataServiceServer:Init({ Template = DataTemplate, Exclude = { { "Private" } }, })

searchDocs.title: Get​
searchDocs.content: </> Data:Get( path: PathToken?-- Path tipado ou array legado. Omita para a raiz merged. ) → any Reads the merged value (persisted + transient overlay). Omit path for the full root.

searchDocs.title: GetPersisted​
searchDocs.content: Query </> Data:GetPersisted(path: PathToken?) → any Reads the saved ProfileStore value only (ignores transient overlay).

searchDocs.title: GetTransient​
searchDocs.content: Query </> Data:GetTransient(path: PathToken?) → any? Reads the transient overlay at path, if present.

searchDocs.title: HasTransient​
searchDocs.content: Query </> Data:HasTransient(path: PathToken?) → boolean Returns whether a transient overlay exists at or below the path.

searchDocs.title: Typed​
searchDocs.content: </> Data:Typed(path: PathToken) → PathToken Type helper for stronger inference in signals and read/write calls.

searchDocs.title: Set​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:Set( path: PathToken, value: any ) → () Writes and persists to ProfileStore. Server only.

searchDocs.title: SetTransient​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:SetTransient( path: PathToken, value: any ) → () Writes a transient overlay visible in Get() but not saved. Server only.

searchDocs.title: Update​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:Update( path: PathToken, fn: (any) → any ) → () Updates the persisted value using a callback. Server only.

searchDocs.title: UpdateTransient​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:UpdateTransient( path: PathToken, fn: (any) → any ) → () Updates the merged value through a transient overlay. Server only.

searchDocs.title: ClearTransient​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:ClearTransient(path: PathToken?) → () Clears transient overlay at path, or all overlays when path is omitted. Server only.

searchDocs.title: ArrayInsert​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:ArrayInsert( path: PathToken, value: any, index: number? ) → () Inserts into a persisted array. Server only.

searchDocs.title: ArrayInsertTransient​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:ArrayInsertTransient() → () Inserts into an array through transient overlay. Server only.

searchDocs.title: ArrayRemove​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:ArrayRemove( path: PathToken, index: number ) → () Removes from a persisted array and returns the removed value. Server only.

searchDocs.title: ArrayRemoveTransient​
searchDocs.content: Mutation </> Data:ArrayRemoveTransient() → () Removes from an array through transient overlay. Server only.

searchDocs.title: GetOrderedList​
searchDocs.content: Query </> Data:GetOrderedList( path: PathToken, options: OrderedListOptions ) → {OrderedListEntry} Collects and sorts table entries by options.key. Supports order and limit.

searchDocs.title: GetOrderedListWithPriority​
searchDocs.content: Query </> Data:GetOrderedListWithPriority( path: PathToken, key: string, order: OrderedListOrder? ) → () Shortcut for GetOrderedList sorted by one field. Default order: Enum.OrderList.Desc.

searchDocs.title: GetChangedSignal​
searchDocs.content: Signals </> Data:GetChangedSignal(path: PathToken) → Signal Fires when the merged value at path changes (newValue, oldValue).

searchDocs.title: GetPathChangedSignal​
searchDocs.content: Signals </> Data:GetPathChangedSignal() → () Alias of GetChangedSignal.

searchDocs.title: GetIndexChangedSignal​
searchDocs.content: Signals </> Data:GetIndexChangedSignal() → () Fires when a direct child changes (key, newValue, oldValue).

searchDocs.title: GetArrayInsertedSignal​
searchDocs.content: Signals </> Data:GetArrayInsertedSignal() → () Fires when an item is inserted (index, value).

searchDocs.title: GetArrayRemovedSignal​
searchDocs.content: Signals </> Data:GetArrayRemovedSignal() → () Fires when an item is removed (index, removedValue).

searchDocs.title: Destroy​
searchDocs.content: Lifecycle </> Data:Destroy() → () Destroys internal signals and clears transient state.

searchDocs.title: Use case​
searchDocs.content: Player has 500 real coins. An admin panel adds +500 to display 1000, but on leave only 500 should be saved.  local Paths = DataServiceServer.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema -- real progress (saved) data:Set(Paths.Currencies.Coins, 500) -- test panel (NOT saved) data:UpdateTransient(Paths.Currencies.Coins, function(current) return (current or 0) + 500 end) print(data:Get(Paths.Currencies.Coins)) -- 1000 (merged) print(data:GetPersisted(Paths.Currencies.Coins)) -- 500   The overlay is discarded when the player leaves.

searchDocs.title: API summary​
searchDocs.content: Method	Persists?	DescriptionSet / Update	Yes	Real player progress SetTransient / UpdateTransient	No	Admin / QA overlay ClearTransient(path?)	—	Remove overlay (nil = clear all) Get()	—	Merged value GetPersisted()	—	Saved value only GetTransient()	—	Overlay only, if present  Arrays support ArrayInsertTransient and ArrayRemoveTransient.

searchDocs.title: Rules​
searchDocs.content: Use Set / Update for real progress.Use *Transient only in admin or QA tools.Overlay replicates to the client and fires GetChangedSignal.UseMock is not a substitute — it mocks the entire store, not per-session overlay on real data.

searchDocs.title: 1) Install​
searchDocs.content: Add to your game's wally.toml:  [dependencies] dataservicev2 = "kartzrbx/dataservicev2@2.3.2"   Then run:  wally install   In Rojo, sync Packages to ReplicatedStorage.Packages:  { "name": "MyGame", "tree": { "$className": "DataModel", "ReplicatedStorage": { "$className": "ReplicatedStorage", "Packages": { "$path": "Packages" } } } }

searchDocs.title: 2) Define your data template​
searchDocs.content: Create a module with default player data:  local Data = { Currencies = { Coins = 0, Gems = 0, }, Stats = { Level = 1, XP = 0, }, Inventory = {} :: { string }, } export type Schema = typeof(Data) return Data   Keep values JSON-compatible (numbers, strings, booleans, arrays, dictionaries).

searchDocs.title: 3) Initialize on the server​
searchDocs.content: In a server script, initialize DataService once:  local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage") local DataTemplate = require(ReplicatedStorage.DataTemplate) local DataServiceServer = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2).Server DataServiceServer:Init({ Template = DataTemplate, StoreName = "PlayerDataV2", StrictPaths = true, })   After Init, typed paths are available on DataServiceServer.Paths:  local Players = game:GetService("Players") Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player) local data = DataServiceServer:WaitFor(player) local Paths = DataServiceServer.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema data:Set(Paths.Currencies.Coins, 100) end)

searchDocs.title: 4) Init, read, and react on the client​
searchDocs.content: On the client, initialize and subscribe to changes:  local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage") local DataTemplate = require(ReplicatedStorage.DataTemplate) local DataServiceClient = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2).Client local data = DataServiceClient:Init() local Paths = DataServiceClient.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema print("Coins:", data:Get(Paths.Currencies.Coins)) data:GetChangedSignal(Paths.Currencies.Coins):Connect(function(newValue, oldValue) print("Coins updated:", oldValue, "->", newValue) end)

searchDocs.title: 5) Update data on the server​
searchDocs.content: Mutate player data with Set or Update:  local data = DataServiceServer:WaitFor(player) local Paths = DataServiceServer.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema data:Update(Paths.Currencies.Coins, function(current) return (current or 0) + 100 end)

searchDocs.title: Local test environment​
searchDocs.content: This repo includes a Rojo sandbox under Test/ (gitignored). Copy the template and sync:  .\scripts\setup-test-env.ps1 cd Test rojo serve

searchDocs.title: Next steps​
searchDocs.content: Recommended project structureTyped pathsTransient overlayOrdered listsFull API referenceGenerated API docs

searchDocs.title: Example​
searchDocs.content: local Enum = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2).Enum local Paths = DataServiceServer.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema local ordered = data:GetOrderedListWithPriority( Paths.Units.List, "Damage", Enum.OrderList.Desc ) for _, entry in ordered do print(entry.index, entry.value.Damage, entry.priority) end

searchDocs.title: Top N​
searchDocs.content: local top3 = data:GetOrderedList(Paths.Units.List, { key = "Damage", order = Enum.OrderList.Desc, limit = 3, })

searchDocs.title: Enum.OrderList​
searchDocs.content: Enum	MeaningEnum.OrderList.Desc	Descending — highest first (default) Enum.OrderList.Asc	Ascending — lowest first  Strings "asc" and "desc" still work for compatibility.

searchDocs.title: Return shape​
searchDocs.content: Each entry:  { index = number, -- original index in the list value = any, -- full item priority = any, -- value used for sorting }   nil priorities are treated as 0.

searchDocs.title: Paths​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceClient.Paths: PathTree Typed path tree. Available after Init.

searchDocs.title: Init​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> DataServiceClient:Init() → Data Initializes the client and yields for the initial server snapshot.

searchDocs.title: WaitForData​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> DataServiceClient:WaitForData() → Data Yields until replicated data is available.

searchDocs.title: Get​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceClient:Get() → Data? Returns data if the snapshot was already received.

searchDocs.title: GetBufferStats​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceClient:GetBufferStats() → table? Returns QuickNet replication buffer metrics.

searchDocs.title: Destroy​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceClient:Destroy() → () Cleans up client connections and listeners.

searchDocs.title: Folder layout​
searchDocs.content: src/ shared/ DataTemplate.luau -- default player data + export type Schema DataPaths.luau -- optional: re-export typed Paths helper server/ DataBootstrap.server.luau -- Server:Init once PlayerData.server.luau -- PlayerAdded / rewards / economy client/ DataClient.client.luau -- Client:Init + global signals UI/ Hud.client.luau -- reads data, listens to signals   Rojo maps src/shared → ReplicatedStorage.Shared, src/server → ServerScriptService, etc.

searchDocs.title: Bootstrap pattern (server)​
searchDocs.content: Do  One script calls Server:Init at startup.Per-player logic uses Server:WaitFor(player) in PlayerAdded.Paths come from DataServiceServer.Paths, cast with DataTemplate.Schema.  Don't  Call Init from multiple scripts.Store paths on the data instance (they live on the service).Write player data from the client.  -- ServerScriptService/DataBootstrap.server.luau local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage") local DataTemplate = require(ReplicatedStorage.Shared.DataTemplate) local DataServiceServer = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2).Server DataServiceServer:Init({ Template = DataTemplate, StoreName = "PlayerDataV2", StrictPaths = true, AutoCreateMissingTables = false, Exclude = { { "Private" } }, })

searchDocs.title: Client pattern​
searchDocs.content: -- StarterPlayerScripts/DataClient.client.luau local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage") local DataServiceClient = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2).Client local data = DataServiceClient:Init() -- UI modules receive `data` and DataServiceClient.Paths

searchDocs.title: Shared modules​
searchDocs.content: For code used on both server and client:  local DataService = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2) local RunService = game:GetService("RunService") local Paths if RunService:IsServer() then Paths = DataService.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema else Paths = DataService.Client.Paths :: DataTemplate.Schema end   On server 2.2.2+, DataService.Client is a safe stub (paths only). Client methods error on the server.

searchDocs.title: Data template rules​
searchDocs.content: JSON-compatible values only — no Instance, Vector3, CFrame, functions.Stable keys — renaming template keys breaks saved profiles unless you migrate.Nested tables for domains — Currencies, Stats, Inventory, not flat globals.Export Schema — export type Schema = typeof(Data) for path typing.Arrays as lists — Inventory = {} :: { string } for ArrayInsert / ArrayRemove.

searchDocs.title: Replication boundaries​
searchDocs.content: Data type	RecommendationCurrency, stats, inventory	Replicate (default) Admin flags, ban state, roll seeds	Exclude Test / preview values	*Transient (never Set for fake rewards)

searchDocs.title: Script responsibilities​
searchDocs.content: Script	ResponsibilityDataBootstrap	Init, global config PlayerData	load player, starter grants, session hooks EconomyService	Update coins/gems with validation DataClient	Init, expose data to UI layer UI controllers	Get + GetChangedSignal, no writes

searchDocs.title: Local module testing​
searchDocs.content: Use the repo's Test/ Rojo sandbox (gitignored):  .\scripts\setup-test-env.ps1 cd Test rojo serve   Test/default.project.json maps dataservicev2 directly to ../src so you can iterate without publishing to Wally.

searchDocs.title: Checklist before shipping​
searchDocs.content: Server:Init runs once before any WaitFor Client:Init in a LocalScript All writes happen on the server StrictPaths = true Secrets in Exclude Admin tools use *Transient, not Set DataTemplate.Schema used for Paths typing

searchDocs.title: Paths​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceServer.Paths: PathTree Typed path tree. Available after Init.

searchDocs.title: Init​
searchDocs.content: Lifecycle </> DataServiceServer:Init(options: InitOptions) → ()

interface InitOptions { Template: any-- Default player data template (required). StoreName: string?-- ProfileStore name. Default: "PlayerData". UseMock: boolean?-- Use mock ProfileStore (no real DataStore). KeyPrefix: string?-- Profile key prefix before UserId. Default: "Player_". Exclude: {Path }?-- Paths that must not replicate to the client. StrictPaths: boolean?-- Block writes to invalid paths. Default: true. AutoCreateMissingTables: boolean?-- Auto-create missing nested tables. Default: false. }  Initializes the server singleton. Call once at boot. DataServiceServer:Init({ Template = DataTemplate, StoreName = "PlayerDataV2", StrictPaths = true, })

searchDocs.title: WaitFor​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> DataServiceServer:WaitFor(player: Player ) → Data Yields until player data is loaded and returns the Data instance.

searchDocs.title: Get​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceServer:Get(player: Player ) → Data? Returns player data if already loaded, otherwise nil.

searchDocs.title: HasData​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceServer:HasData(player: Player ) → boolean Whether the player session has finished loading.

searchDocs.title: GetProfile​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceServer:GetProfile(player: Player ) → Profile? Returns the underlying ProfileStore profile.

searchDocs.title: Destroy​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceServer:Destroy() → () Cleans up sessions, profiles, and service connections.

searchDocs.title: GetBufferStats​
searchDocs.content: </> DataServiceServer:GetBufferStats(player: Player? ) → table? Returns QuickNet replication buffer metrics.

searchDocs.title: DataServiceServer​
searchDocs.content: Server singleton. Writable. Call Init once at boot.  Method / property	Returns	Description:Init(options)	Server	Initializes ProfileStore, paths, and player lifecycle :WaitFor(player)	Data	Yields until player data is loaded :Get(player)	Data?	Returns data if already loaded :HasData(player)	boolean	Whether the player session is ready :GetProfile(player)	Profile?	Underlying ProfileStore profile :GetBufferStats(player?)	table?	QuickNet replication buffer metrics :Destroy()	()	Cleans up all sessions and connections .Paths	PathTree	Typed path tokens (available after Init)

searchDocs.title: Init options​
searchDocs.content: Option	Type	Default	DescriptionTemplate	table	required	Default player data shape StoreName	string?	"PlayerData"	ProfileStore / DataStore name UseMock	boolean?	false	Uses mock store (no real DataStore). Not per-player transient overlay KeyPrefix	string?	"Player_"	Profile key prefix + UserId Exclude	{ Path }?	nil	Paths that never replicate to the client StrictPaths	boolean?	true	Errors on writes to invalid paths AutoCreateMissingTables	boolean?	false	Auto-creates missing nested tables on write  Recommendations  Call Init exactly once in a dedicated bootstrap script (ServerScriptService).Use WaitFor(player) inside PlayerAdded, not Get, unless you know data is already loaded.Keep StrictPaths = true in production.Use Exclude for secrets, anti-cheat flags, or server-only state.

searchDocs.title: DataServiceClient​
searchDocs.content: Client singleton. Read-only data mirror.  Method / property	Returns	Description:Init()	Data	Yields until the initial snapshot arrives :WaitForData()	Data	Yields until replicated data exists :Get()	Data?	Data if snapshot already received :GetBufferStats()	table?	Latest replication buffer stats from server :Destroy()	()	Cleans client listeners .Paths	PathTree	Typed paths (available after Init)  Recommendations  Call Init() once from a LocalScript under StarterPlayerScripts.Never call Set / Update on the client — mutations are server-driven.Use GetChangedSignal for UI updates instead of polling Get.

searchDocs.title: Data​
searchDocs.content: Per-player data instance. Returned by Server:WaitFor or Client:Init.

searchDocs.title: Read methods​
searchDocs.content: Method	Server	Client	Description:Get(path?)	✓	✓	Merged value (persisted + transient overlay). Omit path for full root :GetPersisted(path?)	✓	✓	Saved ProfileStore value only :GetTransient(path?)	✓	✓	Transient overlay at path, if any :HasTransient(path?)	✓	✓	Whether a transient overlay exists :Typed(path)	✓	✓	Type helper for signals and generics

searchDocs.title: Persisted write methods (server only)​
searchDocs.content: Method	Description:Set(path, value)	Writes and saves to ProfileStore :Update(path, fn)	Reads persisted value, applies fn, then Set :ArrayInsert(path, value, index?)	Inserts into a persisted array :ArrayRemove(path, index)	Removes from a persisted array; returns removed value

searchDocs.title: Transient write methods (server only)​
searchDocs.content: Method	Description:SetTransient(path, value)	Overlay visible in Get() but not saved :UpdateTransient(path, fn)	Updates merged value via transient overlay :ClearTransient(path?)	Clears overlay (nil clears all) :ArrayInsertTransient(path, value, index?)	Array insert through overlay :ArrayRemoveTransient(path, index)	Array remove through overlay

searchDocs.title: Query methods​
searchDocs.content: Method	Description:GetOrderedList(path, options)	Sorts table entries by options.key; supports order, limit :GetOrderedListWithPriority(path, key, order?)	Shortcut for sorting by one field  order accepts Enum.OrderList.Desc (default) or Enum.OrderList.Asc.  Each entry:  { index = number, value = any, priority = any }

searchDocs.title: Signals​
searchDocs.content: Method	Fires when:GetChangedSignal(path)	Merged value at path changes :GetPathChangedSignal(path)	Alias of GetChangedSignal :GetIndexChangedSignal(path)	Direct child of path changes :GetArrayInsertedSignal(path)	Item inserted in array at path :GetArrayRemovedSignal(path)	Item removed from array at path .Changed	Any mutation (action, path, ...)  Transient changes fire the same signals as persisted writes.

searchDocs.title: Lifecycle​
searchDocs.content: Method	Description:Destroy()	Destroys internal signals and clears transient state

searchDocs.title: Enum​
searchDocs.content: local Enum = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.dataservicev2).Enum Enum.OrderList.Desc -- "desc", highest first (default) Enum.OrderList.Asc -- "asc", lowest first

searchDocs.title: Quick decision guide​
searchDocs.content: Goal	UseReal player progress	Set / Update Admin / QA preview without saving	*Transient Leaderboard from a list field	GetOrderedListWithPriority UI reacts to coin changes	GetChangedSignal(Paths.Currencies.Coins) Hide data from client	Exclude in Init Studio without DataStore API	UseMock = true
